title: Agent Stack Suppression Schema
description: Schema for validating agent stack suppression records

id.description: Unique identifier following pattern TYPE-### format

severity.description: Severity level of the suppressed issue

rule_id.description: Identifier of the specific rule being suppressed

scope.description: File paths, components, or areas affected by the suppression

introduced_on.description: Date when the suppression was first added

expiry.description: Date when the suppression should expire

owner.description: Person or team responsible for resolving the issue

rationale.description: Detailed justification for accepting the risk or deferring the fix

issue_link.description: Link to tracking issue for resolution

last_reviewed.description: Date of most recent review of this suppression

tool.description: Security scanning tool that flagged the issue (required for security type)

lane.description: Review lane that flagged the issue (required for review type)

category.description: UI category that flagged the issue (required for ui type)

impacted_flows.description: User flows impacted by the UI issue (required for ui type)

approver.description: Person who approved the suppression (required for critical severity)

resolution.description: Description of how the issue was resolved (for resolved status)

resolution_date.description: Date when the issue was resolved (for resolved status)

resolved_by.description: Person who resolved the issue (for resolved status)

mitigation.description: Temporary mitigation measures in place while issue remains suppressed
